seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Steeple Flat and Stewarts Brook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Steeple Flat vs Stewarts Brook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Steeple Flat and Stewarts Brook.
heading: Steeple Flat vs Stewarts Brook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Steeple Flat, New South Wales and Stewarts Brook, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Steeple Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Stewarts Brook (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Steeple Flat or Stewarts Brook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Steeple Flat has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Stewarts Brook scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Steeple Flat scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Stewarts Brook scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Steeple Flat or Stewarts Brook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Steeple Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
